Find All Distinct Substrings in a String
code:
s = input().lower()
sub = set()
for i in range(len(s)):
    for j in range(i+1, len(s)+1):
        sub.add(s[i:j])

print("Total distinct substrings:", len(sub)+1)
print("Distinct Substrings:")
print("[]")
sb = sorted(sub)
for k in sb:
    print(k)

title: Count the Number of Words in a Trie
Huffman Encoding
code:
n = int(input())
s = input()
f = list(map(int, input().split()))

l = [-1] * 50
r = [-1] * 50
p = [-1] * 50

for i in range(n-1):
    m1 = m2 = -1
    for j in range(n+i):
        if p[j] == -1:
            if m1 == -1 or f[j] < f[m1]:
                m2 = m1; m1 = j
            elif m2 == -1 or f[j] < f[m2]:
                m2 = j
    
    f.append(f[m1] + f[m2])
    l[n+i] = m1; r[n+i] = m2
    p[m1] = p[m2] = n+i
    p.append(-1)

def pre(i, c=""):
    if l[i] == -1 and r[i] == -1:
        print(c, end=" ")
        return
    pre(l[i], c + "0")
    pre(r[i], c + "1")

pre(len(f)-1)
